results.title: REST list endpoints return non-deterministic results across identical calls
results.summary: Min Jaccard across 10 pairs = 0.000 (1.0 means identical sets). Identical calls returned different IDs.

results.title: `where` range operators ($gte, $lte) silently ignored on list endpoints
results.summary: Future-date $gte filter returned 100 rows (meta.total=5720); unfiltered returned 100 rows (meta.total=5720). Filter ignored.

results.title: Non-status equality filters silently ignored
results.summary: customerId equality filter honored — all 2 returned rows match.

results.title: `orderBy` accepted but does not produce monotonic ordering; `collate=true` does not stabilize
results.summary: orderBy returned 100 rows with 47 adjacent-pair inversions. With collate=true: 52 inversions. Expected 0 if sort were honored.

results.title: `offset` parameter silently ignored on /customer; `skip` works
results.summary: offset=0 vs offset=50 returned identical IDs (offset dropped). skip=0 vs skip=50 returned disjoint pages (skip works).

results.title: `meta.hasMore` returns `true` when skip exceeds `meta.total`
results.summary: Probe meta.total=5720. skip=6720 returned 0 rows, hasMore=false.

results.title: `limit` parameter silently clamped at 100
results.summary: Requested limit=500, received 100 rows (clamped to 100). No error, no warning.

results.title: POST /integration/payment/search ignores `createdDate.$gte` filter
results.summary: Future-date filter returned 100 rows (meta.total=3358); baseline returned 100 (meta.total=3358). Filter ignored.

results.title: Order responses do not include services (N+1 sync pattern required)
results.summary: List response lacks services. Detail response lacks services. Sample order has 1 services fetched via separate /service call. For N orders with services, N+1 round-trips required.

results.title: Documented schema field names confirmed in live responses
results.summary: Captured live key sets for Order/Service/Labor/Part. See evidence for field-name confirmation.

results.title: Subcontract field renamed: `wholesaleCostCents` no longer present; `costCents` is the actual key
results.summary: Scanned 5 subcontracts across 400 orders. costCents present on 5 (populated on 5). wholesaleCostCents present on 0 (populated on 0). retailCostCents populated on 5.
